arts.ttl: Report: Everton now in talks to sign Brazil international for David Moyes, he left Liverpool in 2023
Danilo Set to Leave Juventus for Brazil, Napoli Move Falls Through
arts.sum: In a surprising turn of events, Juventus defender Danilo is preparing to bid farewell to Juventus and Italy. The 33-year-old former Porto and Manchester City player has decided to return to his homeland, where Flamengo and Santos are vying for his signature. The post Danilo Set to Leave Juventus for Brazil, Napoli Move Falls Through appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: 'Verbal agreement' reached to sign third centre-back after Vitor Reis, Abdukodir Khusanov announcements
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly have a verbal agreement to sign a third central defender after confirming the arrivals of Abdukodir Khusanov and Vitor Reis.

arts.ttl: Man City HIJACKED Arsenal deal for 'out of this world' Vitor Reis
arts.sum: REVEALED: Man City hijacked Arsenal deal for 'out of this world' Vitor Reis As Marcus Alves has revealed in an article for the BBC, Reis was so highly rated at Palmeiras that they referred to him internally as an 'ET' because his talent was deemed to be 'out of this world.' There are no doubts in his native Brazil that he will succeed at Man City .
